perturbation.original_text: UTK shall not divulge to others, any trade secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning or pertaining to the business and affairs of AVDU, obtained by UTK as a result of its engagement hereunder, unless authorized, in writing by AVDU. UTK represents and warrants that it has established appropriate internal procedures for protecting the trade secrets and confidential information of AVDU, including, without limitation, restrictions on disclosure of such information to employees and other persons who may be engaged in such information to employees and other persons who may be engaged in rendering services to any person, firm or entity which may be a competitor of AVDU.
perturbation.changed_text: UTK may, at its sole discretion, divulge any trade secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning or pertaining to the business and affairs of AVDU, obtained by UTK as a result of its engagement hereunder, without authorization from AVDU. UTK makes no warranties or representations regarding the protection of trade secrets and confidential information of AVDU.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause strictly prohibits UTK from divulging AVDU's confidential information without written authorization, establishing a clear obligation of confidentiality. The modified clause directly contradicts this by allowing UTK to disclose confidential information at its sole discretion, effectively negating the confidentiality requirement. Furthermore, removing the warranties regarding the protection of trade secrets introduces uncertainty about AVDU's protection under the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: VIII. CONFIDENTIAL DATA A. UTK may, at its sole discretion, divulge any trade secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning or pertaining to the business and affairs of AVDU, obtained by UTK as a result of its engagement hereunder, without authorization from AVDU. UTK makes no warranties or representations regarding the protection of trade secrets and confidential information of AVDU. B. AVDU shall not divulge to others, any trade secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning or pertaining to the business and affairs of UTK or confidential information revealed by UTK obtained as a result of its engagement hereunder, unless authorized, in writing, by UTK. C. UTK shall not be required in the performance of its duties to divulge to AVDU, or any officer, director, agent or employee of AVDU, any secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning any other person, firm or entity (including, but not limited to, any such person, firm or entity which may be a competitor or potential competitor of) which UTK may have or be able to obtain other than as a result of the relationship established by this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original text by allowing UTK to divulge confidential information at its sole discretion, removing the previous restriction that required written authorization from AVDU. This creates a clear contradiction within the document as the changed text permits an action that was previously prohibited, causing uncertainty and potential conflict in the interpretation and enforcement of the confidentiality terms. The contradicted text (VIII.A) contains the same contradictory language, emphasizing the in-text contradiction introduced by the modified clause.

perturbation.original_text: AVDU agrees that it will put in place, if it has not already done so, policies and procedures relating to and addressing, with the commercially reasonable intent to ensure compliance with, applicable securities laws, rules and regulations, including, but not limited to: A. The use, release or other publication of forward-looking statements. B. Disclosure requirements regarding the required disclosure of the nature and terms of UTK's relationship with, including, but not limited to press releases, publications on its web site, letters to investors and telephone or other personal communication with potential or current investors. C. No press releases or any other forms of communication to third parties which mention both UTK CORPORATION and AVDU, shall be released without the prior written consent and approval of both UTK and AVDU.
perturbation.changed_text: AVDU is not obligated to implement policies and procedures to comply with securities laws. AVDU has complete discretion over all communications regarding UTK and may release any information without consent. Furthermore, AVDU is not required to disclose the nature or terms of UTK's relationship with it.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause outlines AVDU's obligation to comply with securities laws and obtain consent before releasing communications mentioning UTK. The changed clause directly contradicts this by stating AVDU has no such obligation and can release information without consent. This creates uncertainty about AVDU's responsibilities regarding securities law compliance and the confidentiality of the UTK relationship.
perturbation.contradicted_text: VII. LEGAL COMPLIANCE AVDU is not obligated to implement policies and procedures to comply with securities laws. AVDU has complete discretion over all communications regarding UTK and may release any information without consent. Furthermore, AVDU is not required to disclose the nature or terms of UTK's relationship with it. D. EXECUTION. The execution, delivery and performance of this Agreement, in the time and manner herein specified will not conflict with, result in a breach of, or constitute a default under any existing agreement, indenture, or other instrument to which either AVDU OR UTK is a party or by which either entity may be bound or affected. E. TIMELY APPRISALS. AVDU shall use its commercially reasonable efforts to keep UTK up to date and apprised of all business, market and legal developments related to and its relationship to UTK. F. CORPORATE AUTHORITY. Both AVDU and UTK have full legal authority to enter into this Agreement and perform the same in the time and manner contemplated. G. The individuals whose signatures appear below are authorized to sign this Agreement on behalf of their respective corporations. H. AVDU will cooperate with UTK and will promptly provide UTK with all pertinent materials and requested information in order for UTK to perform its Services pursuant to this Agreement. I. When delivered, the shares of AVDU Common Stock shall be duly and validly issued, fully paid and non-assessable. J. UTK represents to AVDU that a) it has the experience as may be necessary to perform all the required, b) all Services will be performed in a professional manner, and c) all individuals it provides to perform the Services will be appropriately qualified and subject to appropriate agreements concerning the protection of trade secrets and confidential information of which such persons may have access to over the term of this Agreement. K. Until termination of the engagement, AVDU will notify UTK promptly of the occurrence of any event, which might materially affect the condition (financial or otherwise), or prospects of AVDU. - 3 -
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original text by stating that AVDU is not obligated to implement policies and procedures to comply with securities laws and has complete discretion over communications regarding UTK, while the original text states that AVDU agrees to put in place policies and procedures to ensure compliance with applicable securities laws and requires prior written consent for communications mentioning both UTK and AVDU. The changed text also duplicates parts of the 'Contradicted Text', directly contradicting other parts of that same 'Contradicted Text' section like subsections D, E, F, H and K regarding AVDU's obligations, cooperation, and legal authority, which are incompatible with AVDU's stated lack of obligation to comply with securities laws and complete discretion over communications.
